name: P3 Health Partners Inc.
summary: PART I . Background We were incorporated in Delaware as Foresight Acquisition Corp. (Foresight) on August 20, 2020. On December 3, 2021 (the Closing Date), we completed the Business Combinations (defined and discussed more fully below) with P3 Health Group Holdings, LLC, a Delaware limited liability company (P3 Health Group Holdings) and we changed our name to P3 Health Partners Inc.
